summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Groups feature (property-centric). All 15 backend tests passed and all 10 frontend UI tests verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test groups created and cleaned up during testing. One existing group 'Aspley-A' for property prop_ae2519658c27 remains.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Groups feature is fully functional. Property-centric groups with join/leave/delete operations all working. Waitlist functionality structure exists (waitlist array in response) though not fully stress-tested with full groups.
passed_tests: 1. Property codes: GET /api/properties returns property_code for all 26 properties in STATE-SUB-STR-NUM format
2. Create group from property detail page: POST /api/groups with property_id creates group tied to property
3. List groups for a property: GET /api/groups?property_id=xxx filters correctly
4. Join a group: POST /api/groups/{group_id}/join adds member successfully
5. Leave a group: POST /api/groups/{group_id}/leave removes member successfully
6. Delete a group: DELETE /api/groups/{group_id} works for creator/admin only
7. Groups section visible on property detail page when logged in - 'Groups for This Property' section
8. Create Group modal works on property detail page - Group Type dropdown, Is Couple checkbox, submit button
9. Groups tab in Member Dashboard shows property-centric groups with property links
10. Waitlist fields (waitlist array, waitlist_count, spots_available) present in API responses

backend_test_details.TestPropertyCodes: Verified all 26 properties have property_code in STATE-SUB-STR-NUM format
backend_test_details.TestGroupsBackend: Tested list groups, create group, filter by property_id, get group details
backend_test_details.TestGroupJoinLeave: Tested join group, leave group, duplicate join handling
backend_test_details.TestGroupDelete: Tested creator can delete, non-creator/non-admin cannot delete
backend_test_details.TestWaitlistFunctionality: Verified waitlist_count and spots_available fields in responses

frontend_test_details.property_detail_page: Groups section with Create Group button, group cards with Join/Leave/Delete buttons
frontend_test_details.create_group_modal: Group Type dropdown (Mixed/SingleFemale/SingleMale/Couples), Is Couple checkbox
frontend_test_details.member_dashboard_groups_tab: Shows Property Groups with clickable property links, member list, status badges
